block_03: There are only a few hours before our special tournament! If you haven't registered for it yet, this is your last chance.
block_14: All you need to do is make as much profit as possible on your tournament account over the week. The first 15 traders on the Leaderboard will share the prize pool. You can use the prize money for further trading or withdraw it.
block_15: Here's a tip from one of our previous tournaments' winner who took the 4th place and won $8,046:
block_16: “I don’t use very tricky strategies. Normally, I join tournaments at the very end and I evaluate my chances before starting to trade. I choose the direction of the trend and often go all-in, sometimes I repeat this five or eight times in a row…
block_17: I advise everyone to take part in tournaments, since you can trade in them for a long time and not lose as much as on a real account.”
